action_description.get_car_brands: Returns up to 20 car brands from FIPE, grouped alphabetically
action_description.search_car_price: Finds a brand by substring match, returns up to 3 models with prices for the most recent year
action_description.get_vehicles_by_type: accepts 'carros', 'motos', 'caminhoes' or English equivalents. Returns up to 15 brands in the specified vehicle category
